text: What type of ships have to carry the SMPEP for NLS manual onboard their ships?

options.text: Ship of 400 GT or more carrying 15 persons or more
Ships of 150 GT or more carrying oil cargoes
Ships of 150 Gt or more carrying noxious liquid substances

explanation: Under MARPOL Annex II, ships of 150 GT or more that are certified to carry noxious liquid substances in bulk are required to have a Shipboard Marine Pollution Emergency Plan (SMPEP) for NLS on board.
